title: Siraitos luteus
uses: Siraitos luteus, a type of plant native to the Philippines, has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help treat various ailments such as wounds, infections, and skin conditions. Its extracts have also been used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, Siraitos luteus is also used to treat digestive issues, including diarrhea and indigestion. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal uses and its efficacy in treating various health conditions.

intro: Siraitos luteus, also known as yellow Siraitia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly used as a medicinal herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-tumor properties, which may aid in the prevention and treatment of certain diseases. The bioactive constituents of Siraitos luteus include cucurbitane-type triterpenoids, such as siraitoside and other triterpene saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Siraitos luteus is often used to make herbal preparations, including extracts, capsules, and teas, as well as being used as a raw ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
